sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ قَدِيمًا يُسَافِرُونَ عَلَى ظُهُورِ الْجِمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su u stara vremena putovali na leđima kamila.
sentences.translationEn: People in the old days used to travel on the backs of camels.

sentences.translation: Putovanje je bilo dugo i ponekad teško.
sentences.translationEn: The journey was long and sometimes difficult.

sentences.translation: Putnici su nosili vodu i hranu sa sobom.
sentences.translationEn: The travellers carried water and food with them.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْجِمَالُ تَسِيرُ كَثِيرًا فِي الصَّحْرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Kamile su hodile mnogo po pustinji.
sentences.translationEn: The camels walked a lot through the desert.
